subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! Thou seest Thy righteous servants amidst the wicker-doers among Thy creation, and Thy loved ones, distinguished for their outstanding virtue
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تری عبادک الاتقیاء بین اشقیاء خلقک و اولیائک النجباء بین طغاه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @justice and wrath of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for protection
